infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app requires access to the camera to scan and auto-fill receipt/prescription pads using AI.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app requires access to your photo library to select receipt/prescription images for AI auto-fill.

plugins.photosPermission: This app requires access to your photos to select receipt and prescription images.
plugins.cameraPermission: This app requires access to the camera to scan receipt and prescription pads using AI.
